notes: Massie won the full-term 2012 general election in the redrawn district.
Seven-way open-seat Republican primary after Geoff Davis retired; Massie won a crowded field rather than a simple two-way race.
Midterm general election; Massie outperformed his 2012 general share.
Presidential-year general election and Massie's strongest districtwide general-election share in the official series.
General election share moved back near the district's lower-60s baseline.
Presidential-year general election; Massie remained comfortably ahead districtwide.
Two-way Republican primary; Massie crushed Todd McMurtry and showed a very high incumbent floor with GOP primary voters.
General-election share again settled near 62 percent.
Four-way Republican primary; Massie still won decisively but with a lower share than in 2020.
Three-way Republican primary; Massie again won comfortably, but not with a rising share.
